title: doryopteris pedata
intro: Doryopteris pedata, also known as the fan fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Doryopteris pedata are said to include the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, tincture, or poultice to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
